title: New Balance Blends Retro Track Style and Casual Elegance With the 204v Mary Jane
summary:
Name: New Balance 204VColorway: Fan Blue/Vintage Indigo-Black, Neo Flame/Black-Black CementSKU: U204VCMV, U204VMCVMSRP: $120 USDRelease Date: July 8, 2026Where to Buy: New BalanceNew Balance is officially leaning into the slim sneaker movement with the announcement of the New Balance 204v Mary Jane. The Boston-based sportswear brand is ready to debut an updated, laceless variation of its low-profile 204 running platform, fusing mid-2000s track performance geometries with elements of contemporary casual footwear.The upcoming lifestyle model reimagines the traditional mesh runner layout by completely swapping out its standard lace-up infrastructure for a retro-inspired, single Velcro strap closure crossing over the bridge of the foot. Constructed with a highly breathable, open-gauge technical mesh base, the sneaker incorporates tactile panels of premium suede across the toe box and side panels to create a sharp contrast of textures. Designed as a flexible slip-on silhouette, the model integrates an elasticized neoprene collar shroud underneath the primary strap to ensure a reliable and snug fit.Beneath the streamlined upper, the shoe utilizes a thin, minimal sole arrangement that minimizes overall weight while maximizing daily flexibility. A low-profile EVA foam midsole provides lightweight underfoot protection without adding excessive volume or bulk to the shape. The model is finished with a durable rubber outsole pattern modeled after archival 2000s-era strike path configurations, providing solid traction. For its global debut, the model will land in two high-energy color treatments: a vibrant "Fan Blue" dressed with dark indigo hits and an eye-catching "Neo Flame" iteration accented by black paneling.

Click here to view full gallery at Hypebeast
